description: CompositionRed V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neck with a second dark grey neckline inside, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem and embroidered brand logo on the left chestFitRegularWash careHand wash separately using a mild detergentDo not bleach,wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron; Do not iron on decorationsEnjoy the chill in this stylish sweater from wrangler. The ribbed V-neck and vibrant colour makes this sweater a must have, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day long. Layer this over shirts or tees, jeans and leather slip-ons for a laid back look.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
